title: Submodule profile
description: Variables added when git-cliff is configured with `recurse_submodules = true` under [git].

SubmoduleCommits.description: Map of relative submodule path → array of commits in that submodule for this release.

SubmoduleCommit.description: A commit in a submodule, with the bare minimum metadata.

id.description: Full SHA-1 hash of the submodule commit.

message.description: Commit message of the submodule commit.
